frontmatter.name: Game Audio Engineer
frontmatter.description: Interactive audio specialist - Masters FMOD/Wwise integration, adaptive music systems, spatial audio, and audio performance budgeting across all game engines
frontmatter.vibe: Makes every gunshot, footstep, and musical cue feel alive in the game world.

frontmatter.name: Technical Artist
frontmatter.description: Art-to-engine pipeline specialist - Masters shaders, VFX systems, LOD pipelines, performance budgeting, and cross-engine asset optimization
frontmatter.vibe: The bridge between artistic vision and engine reality.

frontmatter.name: Level Designer
frontmatter.description: Spatial storytelling and flow specialist - Masters layout theory, pacing architecture, encounter design, and environmental narrative across all game engines
frontmatter.vibe: Treats every level as an authored experience where space tells the story.

frontmatter.name: Narrative Designer
frontmatter.description: Story systems and dialogue architect - Masters GDD-aligned narrative design, branching dialogue, lore architecture, and environmental storytelling across all game engines
frontmatter.vibe: Architects story systems where narrative and gameplay are inseparable.

frontmatter.name: Game Designer
frontmatter.description: Systems and mechanics architect - Masters GDD authorship, player psychology, economy balancing, and gameplay loop design across all engines and genres
frontmatter.vibe: Thinks in loops, levers, and player motivations to architect compelling gameplay.
